title: Issue Search
description: Enable global keyword search across all issues from the top navigation bar, temporarily overriding type filters and restoring prior filter state after search.
creator: unknown

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented live search control in console toolbar with real-time filtering. Search works across title, description, comments, labels, assignee, and creator fields. X button clears search. Responsive design collapses to icon on mobile. Committed in 821ffae.
